nasb.text: Who prepares for the raven its nourishment When its young cry to God And wander about without food?

esv.text: Who provides for the raven its prey, when its young ones cry to God for help, and wander about for lack of food?

cnv.text: 烏鴉雛鳥因缺乏食物飛來飛去， 向　神哀求的時候， 誰為烏鴉預備食物呢？”

ccb.text: 乌鸦的幼雏饿得飞来飞去， 向上帝哀鸣时， 谁供应乌鸦食物？
